Name: GRAPHICS_CONFIG_CS_RAYTRACING_QUALITY_DETAIL
Description: Determines the parameters of each motion blur quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Raytracing
Fields.Description: If ON, then raytracing is enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Directional Light Shadow
Fields.Description: If ON, then parallel light shadows are enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Ambient Occlusion
Fields.Description: If ON, then ambient occlusion is enabled.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Shadow Ray Sample Scale
Fields.Description: The scale to apply to the ray sample count for directional light shadows.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Shadow Ray Sample Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the ray sample count for directional light shadows.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Shadow Ray Sample Scale
Fields.Description: The scale to apply to the ray sample count for ambient occlusion shadows.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion: Shadow Ray Sample Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the ray sample count for ambient occlusion shadows.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Shadow Cone Scale
Fields.Description: The scale of the shadow cone used for directional lighting. In the range of 0 to 1.0. If you set it to 0, the number of samples will automatically become 1.
